welcome_subtitle: Your daily ritual for healthier skin, calm confidence, and visible radiance.
auth_subtitle: Choose your preferred way to continue
auth_email_subtitle: We will send a secure code to your email
auth_otp_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your inbox
q_intro_subtitle: Here to help you boost your skincare results
q_gender_title: What gender do you identify with?
q_gender_subtitle: Hormones have a big impact on how our skin looks and feels at every age.
q_age_subtitle: At different ages, your skin needs different skincare treatments.
q_skin_title: What would you say your skin type is?
s_oily_desc: Excess amount of sebum(oil), shiny, and enlarged pores.
s_dry_desc: Lacks moisture, tends to feel tight, dull appearance, flakiness.
s_normal_desc: Neither excessively oily nor overly dry, smooth texture, small pores.
s_combo_desc: T-zone (forehead, nose, and chin) oiliness, visible pores.
q_outro_subtitle: I'm not here to "fix" you. You don't need "fixing"! I'm here to support you on your journey to beautiful skin.
